design_decision: Reuse FOXAI Engineering, Repair Bay, manifests, source locator, evidence, validation, rollback and receipt architecture. Do not add a giant agent framework.
notes: Repository content must be reconciled against live files and must not override verified live known-good baselines.
The original V1A-0 package is superseded and must not be previewed or applied.
r2_scope: Static live baseline only. No interpreter discovery subprocesses, no Windows live process collection, no model loading, no package installation.
